user.name: Davin Pangestu Kusumo
user.about: I am a passionate individual with a deep interest in technology and web development. Currently active in my school's esports team, I balance my competitive spirit with a drive to build innovative digital solutions. I love creating clean, functional, and aesthetic user interfaces.
